skills.name: Agent Development
skills.description: This skill should be used when the user asks to "create an agent", "add an agent", "write a subagent", "agent frontmatter", "when to use description", "agent examples", "agent tools", "agent colors", "autonomous agent", or needs guidance on agent structure, system prompts, triggering conditions, or agent development best practices for Claude Code plugins.

skills.name: agents
skills.description: Claude Code agent ecosystem structure, component reference, and development patterns. Use when creating or modifying agents, skills, commands, hooks, or planning ecosystem changes.

skills.name: android-development
skills.description: Android development patterns with Kotlin and Jetpack Compose. Includes templates, patterns, and test examples for building production-ready Android apps.

skills.description: Node.js backend patterns with REST APIs, error handling, and authentication

skills.name: code-review
skills.description: Comprehensive code quality assessment and verification with systematic review process

skills.description: Operational boundaries, safety rules, and documentation standards. Active for all agent operations, file modifications, and architectural decisions.

skills.name: databases

skills.name: debugging

skills.name: error-recovery
skills.description: Standardized patterns for handling transient errors, retries, and fallback strategies

skills.name: figma-integration
skills.description: Figma MCP tool patterns, design token mapping, and visual validation for klara-theme components. Use when extracting Figma data, documenting components from Figma, mapping design tokens, or comparing implementation to Figma designs.
